ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the incident */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score assigned to the incident */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., New, Assigned, Resolved) */,
  "alert_count" INTEGER /* Number of alerts generated for the incident */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was last updated */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the incident */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was discovered */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, responder) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Network, Application, Physical) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., Security, Compliance, Operational) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sources" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Status of the incident before the update */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Status of the incident after the update */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken during the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_history_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_history_update_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was made */,
  "response_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the response */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "response_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_response_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "integration_system" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was made */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration */,
  "integration_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
